questions.question: A ball falls freely from rest. The ratio of distance traveled by it in first, second, third and fourth seconds is
questions.explanation:
u = 0
a = g
s = u + {tex}\frac{\mathrm{a}}{2}{/tex}(2n - 1)
s1={tex}\frac{\mathrm{g}}{2}{/tex}(2-1) = {tex}\frac{\mathrm{g}}{2} {/tex}
s2 = {tex}3 \frac{\mathrm{g}}{2}{/tex}
s3 = 5g/2
s4 = {tex}\frac{7}{2} \mathrm{g}{/tex}
s1 : s2 : s3 : s4 =1: 3 : 5 : 7.

questions.question: If {tex}\frac{3 \sqrt{2}+2 \sqrt{3}}{5 \sqrt{2}-4 \sqrt{3}}=x+y \sqrt{6},{/tex} then the value of (x - y) is

questions.question: If p + q + r = 0, then the value of {tex}\frac{(q+r)^{2}}{q r}+\frac{(r+p)^{2}}{r p}+\frac{(p+q)^{2}}{p q}{/tex} is
questions.explanation:
p + q + r = 0
{tex}\frac{(q+r)^{2}}{q r}+\frac{(r+p)^{2}}{r p}+\frac{(p+q)^{2}}{p q} \Rightarrow \frac{p^{2}}{q r}+\frac{q^{2}}{r p}+\frac{r^{2}}{p q}{/tex}
{tex}\Rightarrow \frac{p^{3}+q^{3}+r^{3}}{p q r}=\frac{3 p q r}{p q r}=3{/tex}

questions.question: If {tex}m^{2}+\frac{1}{25 m^{2}}=8 \frac{3}{5},{/tex} then the value of {tex}m^{3}+\frac{1}{125 m^{3}}{/tex}is
questions.explanation:
{tex}m^{2}+\frac{1}{25 m^{2}}=8 \frac{3}{5}{/tex}
{tex}\left(m+\frac{1}{5 m}\right)^{2}-\frac{2}{5}=\frac{43}{5}{/tex}
{tex}\Rightarrow\left(m+\frac{1}{5 m}\right)^{2}=9{/tex}
{tex}m+\frac{1}{5 m}=3{/tex}
{tex}\left(m+\frac{1}{5 m}\right)^{3}=m^{3}+\frac{1}{125 m^{3}}+3 \times m \times \frac{1}{5 m} \times(3){/tex}
{tex}27=m^{3}+\frac{1}{125 m^{3}}+\frac{9}{5}{/tex}
{tex}m^{3}+\frac{1}{125 m^{3}}=27-\frac{9}{5}=\frac{126}{5}=25 \frac{1}{5}{/tex}

questions.question: A bag contains 25 paise, 50 paise and 1 Rs. Coins. There are 220 coins in all and the total amount in the bag is Rs. 160. If there are thrice as many 1 Rs. Coins as there are 25 paise coins, then what is the number of 50 paise coins?
questions.explanation:
Let 25 paise coins = x
1 Rs coins = 3x
50 paise coins = 220 - 4x
Total amount {tex}=\frac{x}{4}+3 x+\left(\frac{220-4 x}{2}\right)=160{/tex}
x = 40
{tex}\Rightarrow{/tex} 50 Paise coins = 60

questions.question: If x + y + z = 2, xy + yz + zx = -1 and xyz = -2, then the value of x3 + y3 + z3 is:
questions.explanation:
x + y + z = 2
(x + y + z)2 = 4
x2 + y2 + z2 + 2(xy + yz + 2x) = 4
x2 + y2 + z2 + 2(-1) = 4
x2 + y2 + z2 = 6
x3 + y3 + z3 - 3xyz = (x + y + z)(x2 + y2 + z2 - xy - yz + zx)
x3 + y3 + z3 - 3(-2) = (2)(6 -(-1))
x3 + y3 + z3 = 8

questions.question: If xa = yb = zc and y2 = zx, then the value of {tex}\frac{1}{a}+\frac{1}{c}{/tex}is
